nasb.text: And he came into all the district around the Jordan, preaching a baptism of repentance for the forgiveness of sins;

esv.text: And he went into all the region around the Jordan, proclaiming a baptism of repentance for the forgiveness of sins.

cnv.text: 他就來到約旦河一帶地方，宣講悔改的洗禮，使罪得赦。

ccb.text: 他就到约旦河附近宣讲悔改的洗礼，使人的罪得到赦免。

csbs.text: 他就来到约旦河周围所有的地区宣讲为罪得赦免而悔改的洗礼。
